mapper.select: SELECT E.EXAM_SN AS examSn, E.EXAM_TYPE_CD AS examTypeCd, E.EXAM_CHRG_USER_ID AS examChrgUserId, E.EXAM_REG_NM AS examRegNm, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS examRegDt, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_STRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS examStrtDt, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS examEndDt, E.EXAM_STAT_CD AS examStatCd, E.CLASS_SN AS classSn, CL.CLASS_NM AS classNm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXAM_QUESTION EQ WHERE EQ.EXAM_SN = E.EXAM_SN) AS qstnCnt FROM EXAM E LEFT JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = E.CLASS_SN WHERE E.EXAM_CHRG_USER_ID = #{examChrgUserId} AND E.EXAM_STAT_CD != '99' ORDER BY E.EXAM_REG_DT DESC

SELECT E.EXAM_SN AS examSn, E.EXAM_TYPE_CD AS examTypeCd, E.EXAM_CHRG_USER_ID AS examChrgUserId, E.EXAM_REG_NM AS examRegNm, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS examRegDt, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_STRT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS examStrtDt, TO_CHAR(E.EXAM_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS examEndDt, E.EXAM_STAT_CD AS examStatCd, E.CLASS_SN AS classSn, CL.CLASS_NM AS classNm FROM EXAM E LEFT JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CL.CLASS_SN = E.CLASS_SN WHERE E.EXAM_SN = #{examSn}

SELECT EQ.EXAM_SN AS examSn, EQ.QSTN_SN AS qstnSn, EQ.QSTN_ORDR AS qstnOrdr, QL.QSTN_TYPE_CD AS qstnTypeCd, QL.QSTN_CN AS stem, QL.ALLOC_SCR AS allocScr, QL.CORR_ANSW_CN AS corrAnswCn, QL.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId FROM EXAM_QUESTION EQ JOIN QUESTION_LIST QL ON QL.QSTN_SN = EQ.QSTN_SN WHERE EQ.EXAM_SN = #{examSn} AND QL.STAT_CD != '99' ORDER BY EQ.QSTN_ORDR ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO EXAM ( EXAM_TYPE_CD, EXAM_CHRG_USER_ID, EXAM_REG_NM, EXAM_REG_DT, EXAM_STRT_DT, EXAM_END_DT, EXAM_STAT_CD, CLASS_SN ) VALUES ( #{examTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examChrgUserId}, #{examRegNm}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
TO_TIMESTAMP(#{examStrtDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI')
NULL ,
TO_TIMESTAMP(#{examEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI')
NULL , '01', #{classSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE EXAM SET EXAM_TYPE_CD = #{examTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAM_REG_NM = #{examRegNm}, CLASS_SN = #{classSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, EXAM_STRT_DT =
TO_TIMESTAMP(#{examStrtDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI')
NULL , EXAM_END_DT =
TO_TIMESTAMP(#{examEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI')
NULL
WHERE EXAM_SN = #{examSn} AND EXAM_STAT_CD != '99'
UPDATE EXAM SET EXAM_STAT_CD = '99' WHERE EXAM_SN = #{examSn} AND EXAM_STAT_CD != '99'
